overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character navigates crosswalks, turns corners, and crosses streets while surrounded by towering skyscrapers, holographic billboards, and reflective wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with crosswalk and neon signage

events.description: pedestrian in white outfit crosses the path from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking straight along sidewalk approaching crosswalk, passing the neon-lit WILD RIOT building

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white clothing crossing the street from right to left

entered.detail: tall building with illuminated 'WILD RIOT' signage in teal neon
towering glass and steel skyscrapers with neon lights visible in the distance
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide futuristic city street at night, passing the neon-lit WILD RIOT building on the right. A pedestrian in white clothing crosses the path from right to left. The street features yellow crosswalk lines and towering skyscrapers are visible in the distance against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with large digital billboards

events.description: character turns left at the street corner
view opens to reveal large multi-screen billboard structure at intersection

agents.ego_description: turning left at the corner and walking along the new street with large digital displays

entered.detail: tall cylindrical structure wrapped with multiple large digital screens displaying advertisements
glistening wet concrete reflecting the neon lights from surrounding buildings

segments.scene_description: The character turns left at the corner, leaving the WILD RIOT building behind. The scene opens into a wider intersection featuring a massive cylindrical digital billboard structure on the left. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon lights from surrounding glass buildings as sparse pedestrians walk along the sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city street with neon reflections and underpass approach

events.description: character turns right toward the underpass and stairway entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet pavement with neon reflections, then turning right toward the underpass area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the underpass

entered.detail: elevated roadway structure with illuminated edges creating a covered passage
directional arrow lights embedded in the road barrier pointing toward the underpass
illuminated stairs leading up to the elevated roadway on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the wet street, passing the large billboard structure, then turns right toward an underpass. Chevron directional lights line the left side of the road, and an illuminated stairway entrance is visible ahead. Another pedestrian walks ahead in the same direction toward the covered passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass with stairs and vehicle traffic

events.description: character waits for cars to pass then crosses the street at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: approaching the crosswalk, waiting for vehicles to pass, then crossing the street toward the stairs

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving through the intersection from left to right
dark sedan passing through the crosswalk area

entered.detail: curved building facade with illuminated 'WELLS FARGO' signage in white neon
short posts lining the edge of the crosswalk area

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a crosswalk beneath the underpass, where a curved WELLS FARGO neon sign glows on the left. After waiting for a green sports car and dark sedan to pass, the character crosses the street. The area is semi-covered with the overpass structure now closer overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial corridor with massive vertical billboards

events.description: entering dense commercial area with towering vertical advertisements and moon visible overhead

agents.ego_description: walking toward massive illuminated billboards with the moon visible between skyscrapers

entered.detail: towering building-sized digital screens displaying colorful advertisements reaching toward the sky
full moon visible in the night sky between the tall buildings

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dense commercial corridor where massive vertical billboards cover the building facades, creating a canyon of neon light. The moon is visible overhead between the towering skyscrapers. The WELLS FARGO sign and underpass structure are left behind as the character walks deeper into the illuminated urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic city, transitioning from wide open streets into a dense, towering urban canyon. It begins with the character walking past the glowing WILD RIOT building and crossing a wide street under the gaze of distant skyscrapers. As the character turns a corner, the scene opens into a larger intersection where wet pavement reflects the vibrant lights of a massive cylindrical digital billboard. The camera then follows the character toward an underpass lined with chevron lights and an illuminated stairway, pausing briefly for a green sports car and a dark sedan to pass beneath a curved WELLS FARGO sign. Finally, the environment shifts as the character leaves the overpass behind and enters a narrow commercial corridor, where massive vertical billboards create a canyon of light beneath a visible moon.
